## 📝 Description

Closes #ISSUE_NUMBER

Briefly describe the change and why it's needed.

## 🏷️ Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (backward compatible)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (backward compatible)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring
- [ ] 🎨 UI / UX
- [ ] ✅ Tests
- [ ] 📚 Documentation

---

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project standards (`composer lint`)
- [ ] PHPStan passes with no new errors (`./vendor/bin/phpstan analyse`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`composer test:ai`)
- [ ] Migrations are backward compatible (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested the change locally

How was this tested? What scenarios were verified?
